columns_wp.rp_hMpc: projected separation r_p in h^-1 Mpc
columns_wp.wp_hMpc: projected correlation function w_p in h^-1 Mpc

columns_ds.R_hMpc: projected radius R in h^-1 Mpc

data_source: Zacharegkas+2025 tables or DES Y3 data release
extraction_method: transcribe from paper tables or data release
triple_check: z_eff ~ 0.36 consistent with DES Y3 redshift distribution for lens bin 1
rp and R bins match those quoted in paper
units: h^-1 Mpc for separations, M_sun h pc^-2 for DeltaSigma
DES Y3 uses DES Y3 3x2pt cosmology (Omega_m=0.339, sigma8=0.76)
notes: DES Y3 3x2pt cosmology. Very recent paper (2025). Data may be in the DES data release or paper supplementary. Published params are approximate defaults from ZacharegkasHODModel.default_params().
